description:
CLI for the Pagliacci Pizza ordering API. Browse stores, menus, and
available slices; manage your cart, place orders, and track delivery
windows; manage saved addresses, rewards, stored coupons, credit, and
gifts. Backed by Pagliacci's Azure-hosted REST API and authenticated
via Chrome cookies (composed PagliacciAuth header).

tools.name: account_confirm_email
tools.description: Confirm a new account by clicking the email-confirmation link's token. Required: token. (public)

tools.name: account_login
tools.description: Authenticate with email/phone + password. Response sets customerId and authToken cookies. (public)

tools.name: account_password_forgot
tools.description: Request a password reset email. (public)

tools.name: account_password_reset
tools.description: Reset a password using a token from PasswordForgot email. (public)

tools.name: account_register
tools.description: Create a new customer account. (public)

tools.name: address_get_info
tools.description: Get address info by saved ID. Required: id. (public)

tools.name: address_lookup
tools.description: Validate an address and check delivery zone (returns store ID if deliverable). (public)

tools.name: cart_price_order
tools.description: Compute the total price for an order (cart contents, taxes, fees, delivery) before sending. (public)

tools.name: cart_send_order
tools.description: Submit an order. Requires payment information for guests; uses stored payment for authenticated users. (public)

tools.name: customer_feedback_submit
tools.description: Submit customer feedback (guest or authenticated). (public)

tools.name: gifts_check
tools.description: Check the balance of a gift card by ID and PIN (no auth required to check). Required: id, pin. (public)

tools.name: menu_cache
tools.description: Get the full menu (categories, products, prices, descriptions, images) for a store. Required: storeId. (public)

tools.name: menu_product_price
tools.description: Calculate the price for a customized product (size, toppings, modifiers). (public)

tools.name: menu_slices
tools.description: Get available slices across all stores for the current day (perishable, rotates daily). (public)

tools.name: menu_top
tools.description: Get featured top-of-menu items for a store. Required: storeId. (public)

tools.name: rewards_coupon_lookup
tools.description: Look up a coupon by its serial number (validate before applying). Required: serial. (public)

tools.name: scheduling_slot_list
tools.description: List available time-window slots for a store and service type. Required: storeId, serviceType. (public)

tools.name: scheduling_slot_list_for_date
tools.description: List allowed slot times for a specific delivery/pickup date (YYYYMMDD). Required: storeId, serviceType, date. (public)

tools.name: scheduling_window_days
tools.description: List available delivery or pickup days for a store. serviceType is DEL (delivery) or PICK (pickup). Required: storeId, serviceType. (public)

tools.name: store_compute_quote
tools.description: Compute a quote for a specific store with cart contents (returns Delivery, Drone, Pickup wait values). Required: storeId. (public)

tools.name: store_get
tools.description: Get a single store by its numeric ID. Required: storeId. (public)

tools.name: store_get_quote
tools.description: Get quote-store metadata (delivery fee, drone status, pickup wait time) for a single store. Required: storeId. (public)

tools.name: store_list
tools.description: List all Pagliacci store locations with addresses, hours, GPS, amenities, and available slices. (public)

tools.name: store_list_quotes
tools.description: List quote-store metadata (delivery fee, drone status, pickup wait) for all stores. (public)

tools.name: system_site_wide_message
tools.description: Get site-wide announcement banner text (closures, holiday hours, etc.). (public)

tools.name: system_version
tools.description: Get the current API version. (public)
